key.name: toggle-tiling
key.description: Tile all windows on the current workspace, or restore them to their previous positions.

key.name: enable-outline
key.description: Show a colored border around the focused window while tiled.

key.name: outline-color
key.description: Color of the focus outline border (hex format).

key.name: layout-mode
key.description: Tiling layout algorithm: "grid" (square-root grid) or "fibonacci" (master + spiral stack).
